label: 438_macroprudential_esrb_macroprudential policy_borrowerbased
description: Macroprudential policy has evolved in Europe to better manage systemic risks within the financial system. It complements microprudential measures by focusing on broader economic conditions that can affect multiple institutions simultaneously, as discussed at key conferences and by leading policymakers like Mario Draghi.
